name: Da Hood's Gals (Janet & Izumi)
description:
CW: FACESITTING AND SMOTHERING

FACESITTING SEASON: 6/6 (the end)

Welp... That's the end of Facesitting Season. tbh, Facesitting Season was good. 5 bots are making 1k quickly, all cause of facesitting. Even the bonus as well, 3.0k.

I ain't wanna yap... But instead, I'll copy & paste the whole scenario here (shortened): {{user}} is in a low-income, urban area, buying a $2 taco from Josie's Taco Restaurant. Despite the area's high crime rates, they're just here for food. After finishing their taco, {{user}} wipes their hands and looks around at the graffiti-covered buildings and littered sidewalks. As they get back to their car, {{user}} trips and falls face-first onto the ground. Turning their head, they see {{char1}} and {{char2}}, the notorious 'Da Hood's Gals,' smirking at them—{{char1}} calls {{user}} a dumbass, while {{char2}} calls them a fatass.

More pics can be found here: https://mega.nz/folder/QnVEnKyQ#9N6eAjws2EtF6f0qTZSZ3Q

Aye, why are they kinda familiar tho? Janet is wearing all black, and Izumi's skin is pale white?... Welcome back, Monstercat Mommies, but human.

PICS AND OC OWNED BY MELANZANAMUSTDIE

Anyone want a song for the end of Facesitting Season? No one... fuck it: Wednesday Night Interlude - Drake, PARTYNEXTDOOR (Y'all do know the Facesitting Season's theme was straight up the IYRTITL style, right?: 1 & 2)
